name: dashboard-grid
title: Dashboard Grid
description: Responsive 12-column grid (DashboardGrid + DashboardGridItem) that stacks on mobile and resolves named column spans at the lg breakpoint — the layout substrate for blocks.

props.name: DashboardGridItem.span
props.description: Column width at lg (of 12). Below lg items stack / go 2-up.

clinicalNotes: Dashboards are used on wide clinical workstations and on tablets at the bedside — the grid stacks to a single column on small screens so no panel is truncated or side-scrolled during a patient encounter. Named spans (rather than raw column counts) keep block layouts readable and consistent; place the highest-priority panel (patient summary, active alerts) first so it leads on every viewport.
notes: Layer-M0 scaffolding. Uses static Tailwind span classes (no dynamic class names) so the JIT compiler always emits them. Arranges M2 panels inside M3 blocks.
